sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 51

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 51:1
items.html: (to the question) In the last three months, when the embryo comes to the upper dwelling, the correction of the Lights begins, likewise in the above manner: in the three days of absorption, Nefesh of Nefesh; at the forty days of forming, Ruach of Nefesh; and at the completion of the three months, GAR of Nefesh. And these NRNHY [Nefesh, Ruach, Neshama, Haya, Yechida] are the corrections of the Lights. (There)
